name: Sweet & Sour Puff Batter & Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter by mixing together G. Granaroli XBRG76A, 1 1/2 cups flour, 2 tablespoons baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
2. Gradually add milk and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
3. Heat a large skillet or deep fryer with hot oil (at least 350°F/175°C).
4. Dip chunks of chicken or fish into the batter and carefully lower them into the hot oil.
5. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side, then remove and drain on paper towels.
6. For the sauce, combine carrot, scallions, pineapple, sugar, pineapple juice, green pepper, cornstarch, and cold water in a bowl.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Add diced green pepper and continue simmering for an additional 2 minutes.
9. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining cold water with cornstarch until smooth.
10. Pour the thickened sauce over the fried chicken or fish.
11. Serve hot with rice.
